codeReview.summary: Reviewed the mission docs, worker transcript skeleton, worker handoff, and commit `47bc1fdbad61ab9f60fda6b1f0280aead453ce84` against the graceful-shutdown feature contract and `VAL-CROSS-020`. The landed change traps `SIGINT`/`SIGTERM` in the relay server and bot, emits `server-shutdown` notifications to wrappers before closing, keeps the wrapper in degraded local-proxy mode after relay loss, and detaches attached bot users with a clear relay-unavailable message once shutdown makes the relay unreachable. The added unit and integration coverage exercises both the server notification and the end-to-end shutdown flow. I did not find any blocking or non-blocking correctness issues in the reviewed scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Bot-side shutdown propagation is implemented indirectly through per-user forwarding polls detecting relay unavailability, not through a dedicated server-to-bot shutdown event.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: server/src/relay-server.ts sends `server-shutdown` only to wrappers, while bot/src/bot-service.ts detaches attached users when `listUserEvents()` starts returning the relay-unavailable error.

sharedStateObservations.observation: During shutdown, the server suppresses its normal attached-user `session-offline` emission, so attached-user shutdown notification currently depends on the bot's attachment polling path rather than a durable shutdown event record.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: server/src/relay-server.ts gates the websocket close handler on `!shuttingDown`, and bot/src/bot-service.ts surfaces shutdown by handling relay-unavailable errors during forwarding.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission validation artifacts still record the historical pre-fix `VAL-CROSS-020` failure, so the pending robustness user-testing validator will need to refresh that state after this scrutiny pass.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /home/dl/.factory/missions/33afaa22-b81b-48d3-b9b3-131d99d630c7/validation-state.json still contains the old blocked note, while the current code/tests and `bot/src/integration-core-flows.test.ts` now pass the shutdown scenario.

summary: Pass. The graceful-shutdown feature satisfies the reviewed robustness scope and I found no remaining code-review defects in the landed implementation.
